PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?event ?eventLabel ?organization ?organizationLabel ?deaths WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P585 ?date .
  ?event wdt:P1120 ?deaths .
  ?event wdt:P17 ?country .
  ?event wdt:P8031 ?organization .
  ?country wdt:P30 wd:Q46 .
  ?organization wdt:P31 wd:Q7868 .
  FILTER(SUBSTR(STR(?date) , 1 , 4) >= "1980")
  ?event rdfs:label ?eventLabel .
  FILTER(lang(?eventLabel) = 'en')
  ?organization rdfs:label ?organizationLabel .
  FILTER(lang(?organizationLabel) = 'en')
}
ORDER BY DESC(xsd:integer(?deaths))
LIMIT 10
